summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of adoca.net application. All features working perfectly including gallery with 3 events, cotizador with net price, admin panel, and PicParty Live functionality.
passed_tests: Gallery page loads with Paula, Fernanda, Resideo events
All navigation buttons functional (Cotizador, Live, Admin)
Cotizador displays 'Mostrando Precio Neto' badge correctly
Quote calculation with net price logic working
Admin panel loads with all tabs (Events, Live Sessions, Preferences)
Admin shows all 3 events with correct fotoshare.co URLs
Net price preferences configurable from admin
All backend APIs returning correct responses (100% success rate)
Events API returns 3 events with correct fotoshare URLs
Quote API calculates net price correctly
Live session APIs working (create, scan, validate)
